abilities.description: Choose any target. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. CARDNAME deals damage equal to that card's mana value to that permanent or player. Put the revealed cards on the bottom of your library in any order.

effect.description: Choose any target. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. CARDNAME deals damage equal to that card's mana value to that permanent or player. Put the revealed cards on the bottom of your library in any order.
effect.name: DigUntil
